title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/selinux to v1.13.0 - autoclosed
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/selinux](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux) | `v1.12.0` -> `v1.13.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.13.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.12.0/v1.13.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/selinux (github.com/opencontainers/selinux)</summary>

### [`v1.13.0`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.12.0...v1.13.0)

#### What's Changed

- Switch to golangci-lint v2 by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​230](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/230)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​233](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/233)
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​234](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/234)
- keyring: fix typo in EACCES check by [@​cyphar](https://redirect.github.com/cyphar) in [#​235](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/235)
- Add Go 1.25, drop go 1.23, bump golangci-lint by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​236](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/236)
- selinux: migrate to pathrs-lite procfs API by [@​cyphar](https://redirect.github.com/cyphar) in [#​237](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/237)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.12.0...v1.13.0>

</details>
